description_long: This is a suburban-style house with a prominent attached garage, a large driveway, and a gable roof. The property features a spacious backyard with a treehouse, above-ground pool, patio furniture, and a small shed. The house itself has two visible stories, with multiple windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern and a main entryway sheltered by a small overhang. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with darker roofing, and the landscaping includes trees, shrubs, and a privacy fence. The front yard is open, with a car parked in the driveway, while the backyard is more private and recreational. The overall design suggests a comfortable family home with ample outdoor amenities.
description: A two-story suburban house with an attached garage, gable roof, and a landscaped yard featuring a treehouse, pool, and patio furniture. The exterior is light-colored with dark roofing and asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, attached garage, main entryway, and a car parked outside, with the treehouse and backyard amenities visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a treehouse, above-ground pool, patio furniture, and privacy fence, as well as the rear facade of the house.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear of the house, backyard features like the treehouse, lounge chair, and small shed, with the garage and driveway less visible.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage, privacy fence, basketball hoop, and backyard elements, with the house's side and roofline clearly visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, and steps leading up from the driveway
